title: Inspect repo docs/skills alignment for note-lead short-teaser policy after runtime exemption. Focus only on these files in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public: skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md, docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md, docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md. Report exact lines or wording...
summary_text: Findings: - `scripts/local/launchers/vote` and `scripts/local/launchers/v` are shell wrappers that call: - `orchestrator-entrypoint-hint <cmd> || true` - `exec "${launcher_dir}/codex-prompt-launch" vote|v "$@"` - so shell-level `/vote` works only if the local launcher/`codex-prompt-launch` path is available. - See [`scripts/local/launchers/vote:1-7`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/vote) and [`scripts/local/launchers/v:1-7`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/v). - `scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh` only routes slash prompts to `codex-prompt-launch` in `_orch_try_exec_slash_prompt`, gated by `[[ "${args[1]:-}" == "exec" ]]`. - It accepts `/vote` only in that `codex exec /vote ...` form, with optional `-C` handling, then dispatches `codex-prompt-launch vote ...`. - See [`scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh:71-117`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh:71-117) and [`scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh:150-163`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh:150-163). - `scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh` installs/validates: - `/usr/bin` launchers for `vote` and `v`, prompt files `~/.codex/prompts/{kernel,k,vote,v}.md`, and a zsh snippet source line. - The snippet line is hardcoded single-line source for zsh and is installed into `~/.zshrc`. - See [`scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:10-21`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:10-21), [`scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:214-216`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:214-216), [`scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:576`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:576), [`tests/test-install-kernel-launchers.sh:78`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-install-kernel-launchers.sh:78). - Tests currently cover: - shell launcher behavior (`vote`/`v` invoking `codex-prompt-launch`) in [`tests/test-vote-launchers.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-vote-launchers.sh:24-35), - `codex exec /vote ...` routing in snippet in [`tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh:88-90), - doc/runtime contract checks in [`tests/test-codex-vote-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-vote-prompt.sh:71-79). - Docs already state the boundary: - `/vote` and `/v` are local continuation prompts and must not hand off to GitHub from Codex local flow. - GitHub route is explicit `vote-gh`/issue-comment path. - Fallback to plain command launchers when slash prompt loading is unavailable. - See [`CODEX.md:164-167`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md:164-167), [`.codex/prompts/vote.md:39-41`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/vote.md:39-41), and [`README.md:638-641`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:638-641). Minimal safe fix to make `/vote` usable in practice: - Minimal high-impact patch: make slash interception accept direct slash invocation without requiring `exec` in `codex()` path (i.e., support `codex /vote ...` as well as `codex exec /vote ...`), while preserving the current `codex exec` path. - Reason: wrapper currently depends on an `exec`-prefixed form for `/vote` interception, but shell users commonly type slash commands directly. - This is confined to [`scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh) and is backward-compatible with existing behavior. - Add/update regression test coverage in [`tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-o...
